# PHIL.142 ? High Trust, Low Process

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** team_culture
**Subcategory:** high_trust_low_process
**Domain:** TEAM_CULTURE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Trust people to do the right thing rather than adding process

## Application
Hire well, trust judgment, minimize bureaucracy, add process only when needed

## Tags
philosophy, team-culture, high-trust-low-process
